docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ODELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY STREET, UNIT #512 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79622808)
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 79622808) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79560722), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED APR-29-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-29-2026, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 79622808) AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ODELL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ODELL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 79560722) AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ODELL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79560722), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED APR-29-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-29-2026, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, ODELL
